---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this feature solve? What workflow is painful without it?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature clearly. Include key bindings, UI layout, or command names where relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Are there other ways to solve this? Why is your proposed approach better?

## Additional context

Screenshots, links to similar tools, or anything else that would help.
